title: Interoperable Products
description: Set of two or more ARD products sufficiently documented to enable processing across a continuum of geometric and/or radiometric standards for direct quantitative comparison.

definitions.definition: Set of two or more ARD products sufficiently documented to enable processing across a continuum of geometric and/or radiometric standards for direct quantitative comparison.
